summary: Tested ₹5 tree donation feature integration in checkout flow. All 6 features passed verification. The tree donation toggle appears in Order Summary, shows ₹5 amount, adds line item when enabled, correctly updates total by ₹5, and is included in order data. Sustainability page also updated with ₹5 messaging and shop link.

details: ✓ Toggle exists in Order Summary section with data-testid='tree-donation-toggle'
✓ Shows 'Plant a Tree' with '+Rs. 5' amount
✓ Toggle has TreePine icon and checkbox UI
✓ Description: 'Add Rs. 5 and we'll match it to plant a tree together'
✓ When toggled ON, 'Tree Donation Rs. 5' line item appears in price breakdown
✓ Line item shows in emerald/green color for visual distinction
✓ Line item disappears when toggled OFF
✓ Initial total: Rs. 159 (Rs. 110 subtotal + Rs. 49 shipping)
✓ With tree donation: Rs. 164 (+Rs. 5)
✓ After disabling: Rs. 159 (back to original)
✓ Pay button updates correctly with new total
✓ Code includes tree_donation in orderData (line 197)
✓ Sends tree_donation: 5 when enabled, tree_donation: 0 when disabled
✓ TREE_DONATION_AMOUNT constant defined as 5 (line 50)
✓ 'Plant a Tree Together' section present
✓ Shows '₹5' amount in messaging
✓ Text: 'Add just ₹5 at checkout and we'll match it — together we plant a tree!'
✓ 'Shop & Add Tree Donation' button with data-testid='shop-and-donate-btn'
✓ Button links to /#fragrances
✓ 'Option available at checkout' text present

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Tree donation feature well-implemented with proper state management (useState for treeDonation)
✓ TREE_DONATION_AMOUNT constant (5) used consistently for amount
✓ Total calculation correctly includes treeDonationAmount in line 267
✓ Toggle UI has proper visual feedback (green border/background when enabled)
✓ data-testid attributes present for testing (tree-donation-toggle, pay-btn, shop-and-donate-btn)
✓ Order payload correctly includes tree_donation field for backend processing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tree donation feature (₹5) is fully functional in checkout. Toggle in Order Summary adds Rs. 5 to total when enabled. Sustainability page updated to show ₹5 messaging and directs users to shop. Backend integration sends tree_donation value in order payload.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as specified.
